variant_view: Template only: spectrum and orbital rights may be undervalued relative to market capitalization, but ownership, encumbrances, monetization path, debt seniority and cash burn must be verified before any conclusion.

pillars.name: business_truth
warnings: Verify operating segments, asset ownership and cash generation.

pillars.name: survival
warnings: Verify liquidity runway, maturities, covenants and capital commitments.

pillars.name: mispricing
warnings: Document market-implied value for spectrum and orbital rights.

pillars.name: value_capture
warnings: Prove value reaches common equity after debt and partner claims.

pillars.name: price_odds
warnings: Use conservative NAV and cash-burn scenarios.

payer_economics.end_user: government, aviation, maritime and broadband connectivity users
payer_economics.leverage_support_assessment: Contract quality may support portions of debt, but capital intensity, launch risk, spectrum regulation and cash burn govern survival.

thesis_core_facts: common equity retains residual value after claims

metric_rules.rationale: The company may not survive to asset monetization.
Verified residual asset value no longer exceeds market value.

prohibited_actions: Ignore debt seniority or required future capex
